title: Iron Ice
description: Upgrade Ice for Faster Travel in a Vanilla Friendly Way!
body:
![Iron Ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d251145a6fff62b1ed667fc70662913386db1f9.png)

**Iron Ice lets you upgrade regular ice into faster, more powerful tiers using common Minecraft materials. Transform your ice into Copper, Iron, Gold, Emerald, Diamond, and Netherite variants—each one increasing speed for boats and players, perfect for ice roads, racing tracks, and more.**

## **Features:**

- **Upgradeable Ice Tiers** – Upgrade standard ice through six tiers: Copper → Iron → Gold → Emerald → Diamond → Netherite. Each tier increases slip speed.
  
- **Extra Mod Compatibility Coming Soon** – Future updates will allow players to use materials from other mods to upgrade ice.
  
- **Movement Enhancements** – Higher tiers improve speed for players, boats, mobs, and items.
  
- **Enhanced Aesthetics** – Each upgraded ice tier features distinct visual elements, adding variety and flair to your builds.
